items.title: [正面] very enjoyable card game, kinda reminds me of Dark...
items.summary:
very enjoyable card game, kinda reminds me of Darkest Dungeon but with cards instead.

Many Waifus and Husbandos to collect and I know you want pretty pixels! (:

It has PvP too where the characters abilities are completely different from the story mode

items.title: [正面] I am now on Chapter 6, I get to say for a free gam...
items.summary: I am now on Chapter 6, I get to say for a free game, the overall quality is just amazing.
